transcription.text: this big sprawling America is a nation of coffee lovers sipping coffee gulping coffee drinking it by the gallon well America we've got a new coffee you're going to like its name brim and it's strong strong because we drench our brim coffee beans in a rich coffee extract for six hours before roasting but coffee this strong tastes just as good without caffeine so we made our new coffee 97% caffeine free General Foods wants this big sprawling worried nation of coffee lovers to relax America you've got the first strong coffee without caffeine brim decaffeinated coffee freeze-dried brim decaffeinated coffee
